Confidential KSA Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Barari Reef Warehousing LLC by Zahra Oasis Logistics Co. (Issuer; Tadawul-listed), and concurrent issuance of Shariah-compliant Convertible Sukuk (the “Transaction”); C R : 701-﻿Q9-0044; internal file ref: CMA-MC-﻿24-﻿B3.
Parties: Issuer: Zahra Oasis Logistics Co. (“ZOLC”); Target: Barari Reef Warehousing LLC; Advisor: Al-Nibras Capital Advisory; Contact: Mr. Nabeel Al‑Qassar, CFO, n.qassar@zolc.sa, +966-50-000-﻿0000 (fictional).
Economic terms: Purchase price SAR 182,500,000 (cash 65%, ZOLC shares 35% at VWAP pre‑announcement), subject to customary completion accounts; Convertible Sukuk up to SAR 120,000,000, 5.1% profit rate, 5‑year tenor, conversion price SAR 22.40/share, subject to Shariah Board approval.
Materiality and disclosure: The parties acknowledge the Transaction is potentially material relative to ZOLC’s total assets and revenues; per Saudi Exchange (Tadawul) Listing Rules, a binding agreement will be announced immediately during trading hours or before the next session if signed outside trading hours.
MNPI status and selective disclosure: This term sheet contains non‑public information of the Issuer; selective disclosure is prohibited under CMA Market Conduct Regulations; no communications beyond the announcement and any investor presentation published on the Saudi Exchange portal shall be made.
Blackout windows: ZOLC directors, senior executives, and related insiders must observe the closed period from the end of Q2 until publication of interim results and any additional blackout imposed by the Market Rules if signing occurs during an active closed period.
Regulatory approvals: Closing is subject to applicable CMA and Saudi Exchange requirements, Target shareholders’ approval, and, if required, competition clearance; settlement mechanics to be coordinated through the Saudi Exchange announcement workflow and the Issuer’s authorized disclosure officer.
Public reference (non‑MNPI): ZOLC’s non‑binding MoU regarding cold‑chain expansion, announced on 1447/01/12H and available at h t t p s : //announcements.saudi-exchange.com/en/file?id=zx9‑﻿p1 (fictional), remains in force; this reference is already public and does not, by itself, constitute MNPI.
PDPL compliance and data transfer: Personal data shared in the VDR (including National ID / Iqama extracts and commercial registration scans) will be minimized and pseudonymized; any cross‑border transfer will comply with PDPL and SDAIA guidelines, including transfer mechanisms under PDPL Art. 29 and SDAIA‑approved adequacy or derogations.
Personal data disclosure: Signatory for Target, Mr. Sami Al‑Mahrouqi (Iqama No.: 8A‑7*5*9*1‑2; contact: s.mahrouqi@bararireef.com), consents to processing of his role‑related details for diligence; no full ID images will be shared beyond masked formats in the VDR.
Conditions precedent: completion of financial, legal, and Shariah due diligence; no prohibition by CMA or Saudi Exchange; execution of long‑form SPA and Sukuk terms; internal approvals by ZOLC’s Board and Shariah Board; auditor comfort that pro forma impacts are not misleading.
MAC: Closing conditional on absence of a material adverse change specific to the Target; for clarity, changes in macroeconomic conditions, VAT rate shifts, or industry‑wide transport cost inflation shall not, in isolation, constitute a MAC.
Operational carve‑out (non‑issuer disclosure): updates to the internal “Sahab Fleet v2.0” product roadmap and Nahr ERP go‑live schedules are ordinary‑course and do not form part of the issuer disclosure package.
Timetable: non‑binding term sheet execution T0; binding SPA and Sukuk documentation within T0+45 business days; immediate Saudi Exchange disclosure upon signing; expected completion T0+120 subject to regulatory clearances.
Confidentiality: recipients shall not trade in ZOLC securities until a public announcement is made and any applicable closed period ends; data room access is logged and restricted to named individuals only.
Obfuscated refs: Deal codename “PRJ‑﻿Dariya”; internal CR cross‑check 101‑77A‑0931; submission via issuer portal u r l : https://issuer.saudi‑exchange.com/zolc/submit?ref=PRJ‑﻿Dariya&token=ab3c%2F‑x (fictional).
